title: Quotations I
content:
"Wrong is but falsehood put in practice."

"The Siren waits thee, singing song for song."

"Music is God's gift to man, the only art of Heaven given to earth, the only art of earth we take to Heaven."

"There is nothing on earth divine except humanity."

"We talk on principal, but act on motivation."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Savage Landor, titled "Quotations I", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
